[[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Original pages]] [[Category:125 shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] Kawara Shrine can refer to two shrines in [[Ise Grand Shrine]] *{{ill|Kawara Shrine (Naiku)|ja|狭田国生神社|lt_old=Kawara Shrine}} (川原神社) *{{ill|Kawara Shrine (Geku)|ja|河原神社 (伊勢市)|lt_old=Kawara Shrine}} (河原神社) **its sessha {{ill|Kawarabuchi Shrine|ja|河原淵神社}} There is also the similarly names
{{ill|Kawarabuchi Shrine|ja|河原淵神社}} located near {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Geku)|ja|河原神社 (伊勢市)|lt_old=Kawara Shrine}}
== Other shrines (川原神社) ==
* [[Kawahara Shrine]] has the same spelling as {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Naiku)|ja|狭田国生神社|lt_old=Kawara Shrine}}
== Kawara Shrines (河原神社) ==

Kawara Shrine can refer to two shrines in [[Ise Grand Shrine]] *{{ill|Kawara Shrine (Naiku)|ja|狭田国生神社|lt_old=Kawara Shrine|12=draft}} (川原神社) *{{ill|Kawara Shrine (Geku)|ja|河原神社 (伊勢市)|lt_old=Kawara Shrine|12=draft}} (河原神社) **its sessha {{ill|Kawarabuchi Shrine|ja|河原淵神社|12=draft}} There is also the similarly names
{{ill|Kawarabuchi Shrine|ja|河原淵神社|12=draft}} located near {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Geku)|ja|河原神社 (伊勢市)|lt_old=Kawara Shrine|12=draft}}
== Other shrines (川原神社) ==
* [[Kawahara Shrine]] has the same spelling as {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Naiku)|ja|狭田国生神社|lt_old=Kawara Shrine|12=draft}}
== Kawara Shrines (河原神社) == '''Kawara Shrine''' (河原神社) refers to several Shinto shrines located throughout Japan. * {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Gyōda)|ja|河原神社 (行田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gyōda|ja|行田市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Wakasa)|ja|河原神社 (若狭町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Wakasa|ja|若狭町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|ja|福井県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|河原神社 (岡崎市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|河原神社 (清須市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Geku)|ja|河原神社 (伊勢市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県|12=draft}}, an auxiliary shrine of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|河原神社 (舞鶴市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Maizuru|ja|舞鶴市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Matsue)|ja|河原神社 (松江市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Matsue|ja|松江市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県|12=draft}}.
== See Also ==
* [[Kawara-dera]]
